versionName:
If you get an error during the update, do not use the auto updater. Download the zip again from the GitHub release page.
Check GitHub for complete changelist
Huge thanks to energydrink02 and ItsPepperpot for the majority of the changes on this update

- Added a new GameCube banner editor
- Add a dialog to build PlayStation 2 ISOs and run with PCSX2
- Renamed and moved menu items
- Open level shortcut changed to Ctrl+O
- Recent archives now shown under Archive Editor menu
- Add Legacy Save option
- Unties camera movement from framerate
- Added a toggle to show/hide vertex colors
- Preserves relative asset positions when placing clipboard or user templates
- Vertex colors are no longer automatically added to models on import - now you can choose
- Big improvements to RatProto and ROTU modding: updated editors for multiple asset types and templates
- Asset data alignment fixes for multiple assets and platforms. This should reduce issues (specially audio related) when saving HIPs
- Mulitple fixes related to importing audio files
- Prevent gizmo being over-sensitive when snapping to grid
- Added snapping in 15 degree increments for gizmo rotations when snapping is enabled
- Add Script to Group of Timers converter
- Randomizer logic update
